title: Photorealistic Gym Selfie Young Blonde Woman Wearing
sourceTitle: Photorealistic Gym Selfie Young Blonde Woman Wearing
prompt: Photorealistic gym selfie of a young blonde woman wearing beige athletic wear (sports bra and leggings) and black over-ear headphones, seated in a modern luxury gym with dark wood ceilings, floor-to-ceiling mirrors, workout machines, and warm golden sunlight streaming through large windows. Natural skin texture, soft makeup, centered composition, shallow depth of field, high detail, realistic lighting.
